channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kazakhstan’s SOS 102: Redefining Public Safety Through Innovation
item.description: Emergency response systems worldwide are undergoing rapid transformation, and Kazakhstan is no exception. With the introduction of the SOS 102 app, the country has set a new standard for public safety, redefining how law enforcement interacts with citizens.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 3 promesse che ogni CIO dovrebbe mantenere nel 2025
item.description: Quasi tutte le novità tecnologiche dell’anno scorso erano legate all’AI generativa, che è stata talmente pubblicizzata nel 2023 che ogniazienda ha dovuto provarla in uno o più progetti nel corso del 2024.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: MrBeast not quite in the bidding race for TikTok just yet, rep says
item.description: Jimmy Donaldson — better known online as MrBeast — isn't in the TikTok bidding race just yet, according to a representative for the YouTube star. Donaldson stirred interest in a Jan. 13 post on X saying he’d “buy TikTok so it doesn’t get banned.
item.dc:creator: JAMES POLLARD, HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump faces crypto world backlash after launch of meme coin
item.description: President Trump is facing backlash after he and first lady Melania Trump launched two cryptocurrency tokens just days before his inauguration.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Copilot AI comes to Microsoft 365 plans: Everything you need to know
item.description: If you’re a Microsoft 365 subscriber with a Personal or Family subscription, Microsoft just flipped a switch and activated Copilot AI features for your account. It’s a new part of your subscription, along with that 1TB of OneDrive storage and access to Office apps like Word and Excel.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump pardons founder of Silk Road website
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump announced Tuesday that he had pardoned Ross Ulbricht, the founder of Silk Road, an underground website for selling drugs.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump, a populist president, is flanked by tech billionaires at his inauguration
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Some of the most exclusive seats at President Donald Trump’s inauguration on Monday were reserved for powerful tech CEOs who also happen to be among the world’s richest men.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The Future of Hypercars: BYD's Yangwang U9 Revolutionizes Electric Vehicles
item.description: BYD's premium Yangwang brand has unveiled the Yangwang U9, an electric hypercar that redefines performance in the automotive world. With its staggering 1,287 horsepower and advanced autonomous driving capabilities, this car is making waves in the industry.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Melania meme coin launches following Trump's new cryptocurrency
item.description: The website for the coin describes “Melania Memes” as “fungible crypto assets created and tracked on the Solana blockchain.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: How TikTok grew from a fun app for teens into a potential national security threat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — If it feels like TikTok has been around forever, that's probably because it has, at least if you're measuring via internet time.
item.dc:creator: DAVID HAMILTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: For TikTok users, mourning, frustration and clinging to hope as TikTok ban looms
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The U.S. is inching closer and closer to a potential TikTok ban — with the nation's highest court upholding a law that's set to halt new downloads of the app starting Sunday.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS and MAE ANDERSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 24 is now in a second rampdown phase, with the feature set frozen at 24 features, ranging from a class-file API to a fourth preview of structured concurrency.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: TikTok refugees are pouring to Xiaohongshu. Here's what you need to know about the RedNote app
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the fate of TikTok hangs in the balance, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu, also called RedNote – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: FU TING and DAVID COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Who could buy TikTok? Only a few parties are serious about offering
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The supremely popular TikTok could be banned on Jan. 19 under a federal law that forces the video sharing platform to divest itself from its China-based parent company, ByteDance, or shut down its U.S. operations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: These mistakes could tank your credit score
item.description: Even small mistakes can negatively impact your credit score; here are some of the most common credit report errors and how you can fix them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oracle updates Exadata systems to speed database operations
item.description: If you had forgotten that Oracle was in the hardware business, it’s easy to understand why, as Oracle has not exactly promoted the business very well. Oracle’s hardware is descended from Sun Microsystems servers, which Oracle acquired in 2010.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Bitcoin soars past $100,000 ahead of possible early action on crypto by Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The price of bitcoin topped $100,000 again early Friday as a pumped up cryptocurrency industry expects early action by Donald Trump when he's sworn in as president next week.
item.dc:creator: ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Best ways to give your old iPhone a second life
item.description: Tech guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explores the many different ways you can repurpose that old iPhone of yours rather than trashing it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden won't enforce TikTok ban, official says, leaving fate of app to Trump
item.description: President Joe Biden won't enforce a ban on the social media app TikTok that is set to take effect a day before he leaves office on Monday, a U.S. official said Thursday, leaving its fate in the hands of President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What everyone’s missing about Android upgrades in 2025
item.description: When we talk about Android upgrades, it’s all too easy to miss the forest for the trees. It’s a familiar tale here in the land o’ Googley matters — and with some wacky-seeming changes on the way for Android upgrades in 2025, the myopic musings are only getting louder.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Federated learning: The killer use case for generative AI
item.description: Let’s imagine a fictional company, Global Retail Corporation, a multinational retail chain struggling with its initial approach to AI integration.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Biden’s clean AI infrastructure plan could be hanging by a thread
item.description: An executive order from outgoing US president Joe Biden aimed at advancing the nation’s leadership in AI infrastructure is “welcome and needed in theory, but this one seems rushed and somewhat at odds with the order just passed on AI chip export restrictions,” an analyst said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: SASE 2025: Impact grows despite adoption hurdles
item.description: Secure access service edge technologies will garner a lot of attention in 2025, according to a recent survey, but despite the many benefits SASE promises, network and security leaders face an equal number of challenges in successfully implementing the technology.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Biden's new executive order aims to shore up US cyber defenses
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden issued an executive order Thursday aimed at strengthening the nation's cybersecurity and making it easier to go after foreign adversaries or hacking groups that try to compromise U.S. internet and telecommunication systems.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: ChatGPT gets support for reminders and scheduled searches
item.description:
OpenAI has started rolling out a number of new features to ChatGPT, according to Techcrunch.
The big news is support for reminders; the feature allows users, for example, to ask ChatGPT to remind them when it’s time to renew an ID or passport.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Drone collides with paraglider, forcing emergency landing
item.description: The incident happened the same day that a firefighting aircraft had to be grounded while battling the Palisades Fire.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, NewsNation

item.title: Snowflake open sources SwiftKV to reduce inference workload costs
item.description: Cloud-based data warehouse company Snowflake has open-sourced a new proprietary approach — SwiftKV — designed to reduce the cost of inference workloads for enterprises running generative AI-based applications. SwiftKV was launched in December.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Soft robotic armband gives prosthetic hand users natural control
item.description: Researchers found in a study that users of a robotic prosthetic hand could successfully grasp and move two objects at once without dropping them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC posts 57% surge in profit thanks to the AI boom
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Taiwan computer chip maker TSMC reported Thursday that its profit in the last quarter rose 57%, buoyed by the artificial intelligence boom. The world’s biggest semiconductor manufacturer reported a net profit of 374.7 billion new Taiwan dollars ($11.4 billion), higher than expected.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
